auth.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {n} characters.

changePassword.newPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least {n} characters.
changePassword.newPasswordRequiresNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
changePassword.newPasswordRequiresLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
changePassword.newPasswordRequiresUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
changePassword.genericError: Unable to update password. Please check your entries and try again.

product.priceRequired: At least one price is required
product.optionValuesRequired: Value is required (eg: Small, Medium, Large)
product.variantPriceRequired: Price is required for this variant

outlet.latitudeMustBeNumeric: Latitude must be a valid number
outlet.longitudeMustBeNumeric: Longitude must be a valid number

shippingZone.codeMax32: Zone code must be at most 32 characters
shippingZone.countryInvalid: Country must be a 2-letter ISO code
shippingZone.methodsRequired: Select at least one shipping method

shippingMethod.priorityMin: Priority must be zero or greater

fulfillment.shippingFeeNonNegative: Shipping fee must be zero or greater
fulfillment.reasonRequired: Reason is required when the shipping method or fee changes

reason.codeMax64: Reason code must be at most 64 characters

courier.nameMax: Courier name must be at most 191 characters

staffDepartment.nameMax: Staff department name must be at most 191 characters
staffDepartment.commissionMin: Commission rate must be at least 0
staffDepartment.commissionMax: Commission rate must be at most 100

discount.percentageValueRange: Percentage must be greater than 0 and at most 100
discount.fixedValuePositive: Fixed discount amount must be greater than 0
discount.freeShippingValueNonNegative: Value must be zero or greater for free shipping
discount.minAmountGtMax: Minimum amount cannot be greater than maximum amount
discount.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date

voucher.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date

productUpdate.essentialProductDetails: Essential product details, images, and settings

productUpdate.productTypeDescription: Determines whether this product is a physical item (with stock) or a service/maintenance (no inventory).
productUpdate.organizeWithCategories: Organize your product with categories, tags, and brands
productUpdate.setPricesCurrency: Set your product prices and currency
productUpdate.setPricesOptional: Set your prices. Sale price is optional and will be displayed as a discount.

productUpdate.additionalInfoDescription: Add variations, service settings, and tax options for this product.
productUpdate.additionalInfoTooltip: Add variants like sizes, colors, or other options. Each combination creates a unique variant.

productUpdate.salePriceHigherThanOriginal: Sale price is higher than original price — please check.
productUpdate.salePriceLowerThanCost: Sale price cannot be lower than cost price. It has been reset to the cost price.
productUpdate.configureBookingRequirements: Configure booking requirements, duration, and operating hours for this service.
productUpdate.setUpServiceTooltip: Set up maintenance-specific details like booking requirements and operating hours.
productUpdate.addServiceInformation: Add service information such as booking requirements, duration, working hours, and off days for this service.
productUpdate.createVariationsOfProduct: Create variations of this product with different options like color, size, or format.

productUpdate.configureTaxRulesProduct: Configure tax rules and rates for this product.

productUpdate.configureTaxSettingsProduct: Configure tax settings for this product. Tax rules can be applied based on your location and regulations.

productForm.optionGeneralDesc: Enter the essential information about your product option including name and values. (e.g. Color, Size, etc.)

discountForm.validityPeriodUnsetHint: Open-ended: no fixed start or end date.
discountForm.validityPeriodPopoverHint: Add dates to limit how long it runs. Leave empty and Apply to keep it open-ended.
discountForm.codeHint: Unique code customers or staff use to identify this discount
discountForm.descriptionHint: Short label staff see in lists and when applying this discount
discountForm.usageLimitHint: Max total uses. Leave empty for unlimited.

discountForm.reviewConditionSpendRange: Order total must be between {currency} {min} and {currency} {max}.

discountForm.reviewFilterExcludeProductLead: Discount does not apply when the order includes any of these products:

discountForm.reviewFilterExcludeCategoryLead: Discount does not apply when the order includes products under these categories:

discountForm.reviewFilterExcludeTagLead: Discount does not apply when the order includes products with these tags:

discountForm.reviewFilterExcludeTypeLead: Discount does not apply when the order includes products of these types:
discountForm.allocationHint: Set to bill discount (whole order) or item discount (each line item).
discountForm.allocationFixedHint: This is fixed by the voucher type you selected.
discountForm.conditionsHelp: Optional: limit when this discount applies (e.g. specific products or groups).
discountForm.noConditions: No conditions — discount applies according to your rule only.
discountForm.minOrderAmtHint: Minimum spend to get the discount. 0 or empty means no minimum.
discountForm.maxDiscAmtHint: Caps total deduction for percentage discounts. Leave empty for no cap.
discountForm.filterValuePickerDescription: Search, sort, and select multiple values. Selected values are saved as comma-separated text.
discountForm.filterValuePickerCategoryDescription: Browse the nested category tree, add category codes to your selection, then apply. Values are saved as comma-separated codes.
